data.title: Sirios Unveils Fully Funded 2026 Drill Campaign to Advance Cheechoo and James Bay Gold Portfolio
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sirios Resources ( (TSE:SOI) ) has provided an update.

Sirios Resources has outlined a fully funded 2026 exploration program centered on a two-phase, 35,000-metre drilling campaign at its Cheechoo Gold Project, beginning with 25,000 metres in the second quarter to expand and refine the resource estimate. The initial phase targets a modeled exploration zone, metasediments within the current pit shell, and the higher-grade Eclipse sector, with a second phase of at least 10,000 metres planned for early 2027 to support an updated resource estimate and a Preliminary Economic Assessment in the first half of 2027.

Additional work is planned across the company’s broader portfolio, including a follow-up program at the Aquilon project with partner Sumitomo Metal Mining Canada, ongoing compilation and planning at the PLEX project ahead of 2027 fieldwork, and a helicopter-borne magnetic survey at the Fagnant project in the second quarter of 2026. Sirios has also engaged Resource Stock Digest for a three-month, US$100,000 marketing campaign, underscoring efforts to raise its market profile as it ramps up exploration across multiple properties.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SOI) stock is a Hold with a C$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sirios Resources stock, see the TSE:SOI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SOI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SOI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue operations, recurring losses, and negative TTM free cash flow), partially offset by a strong, low-debt balance sheet. Technicals add modest support as price is above key moving averages with neutral-to-positive momentum, while valuation is unfavorable/unclear due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SOI stock, click here.

More about Sirios Resources

Sirios Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region of Quebec. Its key assets include the Cheechoo Gold Project as well as the Aquilon, PLEX, and Fagnant properties, where it is advancing drilling and early-stage exploration to define and expand gold resources.

Average Trading Volume: 881,238

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$101.5M

data.title: Terra Rossa Advances Vetas Exploration and Extends Warrants by One Year
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Baroyeca Gold & Silver ( (TSE:TRR) ).

Terra Rossa Gold Ltd. reported progress on exploration and development at its Vetas Gold Project in Colombia, where recent geological mapping, geophysical and geochemical analysis have been integrated into a 3D model to guide detailed surface mapping and a first-pass drilling program slated for late Q2 or early Q3. The company plans to target chargeability and resistivity anomalies, as well as validate high-grade historical drill results in the Real Minera area, indicating a move toward more advanced evaluation of the project’s mineral potential.

The company also plans to extend the expiry of 4,092,000 outstanding share purchase warrants by one year to April 7, 2027, subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval, with all other terms unchanged and no action required from holders. This extension preserves an additional potential source of future equity funding and aligns the warrant timeline with Terra Rossa’s near-term exploration and drilling plans at Vetas.

More about Baroyeca Gold & Silver

Terra Rossa Gold Ltd. is a gold exploration and development company focused on its wholly owned Vetas Gold Project in the Santander gold district of Colombia, part of the Vetas-California epithermal gold belt. The company is led by an experienced mine development team, supported by a local exploration and administration staff and a community relations office in the town of Vetas.

Average Trading Volume: 53,517

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$28.31M

data.title: Capitan Silver Expands High-Grade Zones at Cruz de Plata With New Deep Drilling Results
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Capitan Silver ( (TSE:CAPT) ).

Capitan Silver reported new assay results from ten reverse circulation drill holes at its Cruz de Plata project in Durango, highlighting further high-grade silver mineralization along the Jesus Maria Silver Trend. The 60,000-metre multi-rig drill campaign, now with three of four rigs on site, underscores the company’s strategy to grow its silver-gold resource base at depth and along strike.

The standout hole 25-ERRC-52 intersected 1,450.5 grams per tonne silver equivalent over 1.5 metres within a broader 41.1-metre interval grading 211.0 grams per tonne silver equivalent, extending mineralization 25 metres down-dip and suggesting zones widen at depth. Additional holes on both sides of the Peñoles Fault and along the Gully Fault confirmed continuity of silver mineralization and revealed a new gold zone near the Capitan Hill oxide deposit, while pending assays and a recent airborne geophysical survey are set to shape deeper targeting and future drilling priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CAPT) stock is a Hold with a C$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capitan Silver stock, see the TSE:CAPT Stock Forecast page.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, ongoing losses, and cash burn), partially offset by a supportive technical setup with price above key moving averages and positive momentum. Valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on CAPT stock, click here.

More about Capitan Silver

Capitan Silver Corp. is a Vancouver-based exploration company focused on advancing its Cruz de Plata silver-gold project in Durango, Mexico. The company targets intermediate sulfidation epithermal systems along the Jesus Maria Silver Trend, aiming to define and expand high-grade silver and oxide gold resources through extensive reverse circulation and diamond drilling programs.

data.title: Midland and SOQUEM to Launch IP Survey at High-Grade Malaco Mountain Discovery
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Midland Exploration ( (TSE:MD) ) is now available.

Midland Exploration, in partnership with SOQUEM, is advancing its Malaco Mountain project in Quebec’s Labrador Trough with a 15-line-kilometre induced polarization survey and ground prospecting planned for August 2026. The work aims to refine exploration and drilling targets over the eastern part of the property by integrating geophysical, geological and geochemical data.

The campaign follows a 2025 discovery of high-grade copper, gold, silver and rare earth element mineralization in stratiform horizons and veins, where samples returned up to 31.60% copper and notable gold and REE values. The partners have confirmed continuation of their strategic alliance with a joint annual exploration budget of $1 million for Malaco Mountain and Nachicapau, underscoring a sustained push to unlock the Labrador Trough’s potential for strategic minerals.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MD) stock is a Hold with a C$0.45 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Midland Exploration stock, see the TSE:MD Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Surge Battery Metals Advances Metallurgical Testing at Nevada North Lithium Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Surge Exploration Inc ( (TSE:NILI) ).

Surge Battery Metals, through its joint venture Nevada North Lithium LLC with Evolution Mining, has launched an advanced metallurgical optimization program with Kemetco Research to support the pre-feasibility study for the Nevada North Lithium Project. Using a master composite representing the first decade of planned production and engineered with Fluor, the program aims to validate process design and scale up from bench to commercial plant.

The work will refine the full processing flowsheet, including sulfuric acid leaching, impurity removal, counter-current decantation, and zero liquid discharge integration, while confirming the production of high-purity lithium carbonate. Surge is also evaluating the potential recovery of cesium and rubidium as by-products, which could enhance project economics and further de-risk the development of its flagship U.S. claystone lithium asset.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NILI) stock is a Buy with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Surge Exploration Inc stock, see the TSE:NILI Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NILI is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak financial performance (no revenue, recurring losses, and ongoing cash burn), despite the benefit of zero debt. Technicals are supportive with a strong uptrend, but overbought RSI increases pullback risk. Valuation is not compelling given negative earnings and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on NILI stock, click here.

More about Surge Exploration Inc

Surge Battery Metals Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on developing high-grade lithium deposits for the battery and electric vehicle markets. Scryb ( (TSE:SCYB) ) has provided an announcement.

Scryb Inc. reported that all resolutions at its March 31, 2026 annual general meeting were approved with more than 99% shareholder support, signaling strong backing for management, its refreshed strategy, and long-term direction. The company also acknowledged the departure of long-serving directors Greg Van Staveren, Michael Kitchen, and Michael Minder, thanking them for their contributions.

The firm strengthened its board by appointing two new independent directors, capital markets specialist Akshay D’Souza and financial reporting expert Graeme Parker, CPA, CA, to support its streamlined operations and high-conviction investment strategy in technology. Chief executive James Van Staveren said the changes, combined with a strengthened balance sheet and disciplined portfolio focus, leave Scryb better positioned to deliver sustainable long-term value to stakeholders.

data.title: Aurania Conserves Cash with Stock Option Fees and Amends CEO Loan
data.description:

Aurania Resources ( (TSE:ARU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Aurania Resources has moved to conserve cash by having certain directors receive their first-quarter 2026 fees entirely in stock options, while also granting them additional options to replace previously expired, out-of-the-money awards. In total, directors received 203,000 options exercisable over three years at $0.205, and a consultant was granted 40,000 options exercisable over one year at the same strike price.

The company also adjusted the terms of an existing shareholder loan of up to US$2,094,500 from CEO Dr. Keith Barron, extending the maturity to twelve months and one day after any repayment notice he provides. These steps highlight Aurania’s continued reliance on equity-based compensation and insider financing to support its operations and preserve liquidity as it advances its mineral exploration portfolio.

data.title: Aclara Files Final Environmental Addendum for Chilean Rare Earths Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aclara Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:ARA) ) has provided an update.

Aclara Resources has submitted the final Extraordinary Addendum to Chile’s Environmental Assessment Service for its Penco Module Project, marking the last stage of the environmental evaluation process for this key heavy rare earths development. The addendum addresses the final round of technical observations with refined engineering designs, enhanced environmental analyses and adaptive measures following recent wildfires, underscoring the project’s commitment to high environmental and social standards.

The Penco Module is positioned to supply significant volumes of heavy rare earths to a more diversified and cleaner global supply chain, potentially delivering long-term value to Chile’s Biobío Region while strengthening Aclara’s role in sustainable rare earth production. The company’s proactive environmental management in Chile complements its broader strategy of securing reliable heavy rare earth sources and processing capacity across Brazil, the United States and its alloy-making joint venture, supporting stakeholders seeking resilient and responsible supply chains for critical minerals.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ARA) stock is a Buy with a C$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aclara Resources, Inc. stock, see the TSE:ARA Stock Forecast page.

Technicals are currently supportive (strong uptrend), but overbought signals add near-term risk, and valuation remains difficult to justify with negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ARA stock, click here.

More about Aclara Resources, Inc.

Aclara Resources Inc., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange, is focused on building a vertically integrated supply chain for rare earth alloys used in permanent magnets, targeting critical materials for clean energy and advanced technologies. Its core assets include the Carina Project in Brazil and the Penco Module in Chile, both based on ionic clay deposits rich in heavy rare earths and developed using the company’s patented Circular Mineral Harvesting technology, alongside plans for a U.S. separation plant and an alloy-making joint venture with CAP.

data.title: SPC Nickel Extends Vale Agreement Timeline for West Graham Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SPC Nickel ( (TSE:SPC) ) has issued an update.

SPC Nickel has amended its cooperation agreement with Vale Canada for the West Graham nickel-copper project in the Sudbury Basin, extending the deadline to complete a feasibility study by one year to June 30, 2027. The extension also pushes back a related option deadline to June 30, 2029, while leaving all other terms unchanged.

The company highlighted recent milestones at West Graham, including a maiden mineral resource estimate, completion of a pre-feasibility level metallurgical study and more than 16,700 metres of drilling. The extended timeline gives SPC Nickel additional runway to advance the project methodically toward a feasibility study and continue assessing its economic viability ahead of a potential production decision, reinforcing its position in a key Canadian nickel-copper camp.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SPC) stock is a Hold with a C$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SPC Nickel stock, see the TSE:SPC Stock Forecast page.

Technicals also weaken the outlook, with price below key moving averages and negative MACD. Valuation is constrained by a negative P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SPC stock, click here.

More about SPC Nickel

SPC Nickel Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on high-grade polymetallic copper-nickel-platinum group metal deposits in Nunavut and the Sudbury Mining Camp. The company’s key assets include the district-scale Muskox Project in Nunavut and the 100%-owned Lockerby East project in Sudbury, which hosts the West Graham and LKE resources in Tier-1 mining jurisdictions across Canada.

data.title: AUX International Reassigns Veteran Executive Shen Guoying to Non-Executive Director Role
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

AUX International Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2080) ) has shared an announcement.

AUX International Holdings Ltd. has announced that executive director Ms. Shen Guoying will be re-designated as a non-executive director with effect from 1 April 2026, reflecting her wish to focus on other business commitments. Ms. Shen, a senior accountant in the PRC with over three decades of finance management experience and current chairmanship at Ningbo Sanxing Medical Electric Co., Ltd., will continue to serve on the board under a new three-year service agreement, receiving nominal annual remuneration of HK$1 subject to periodic review.

The redesignation preserves Ms. Shen’s involvement in the company’s governance while reducing her executive responsibilities, indicating a shift in her day-to-day role rather than a departure from the group. The board states there are no additional matters requiring shareholder attention in connection with this change, suggesting a routine governance adjustment with limited immediate operational impact but continuity in board oversight and experience.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2080) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.34 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AUX International Holdings Ltd. stock, see the HK:2080 Stock Forecast page.

More about AUX International Holdings Ltd.

AUX International Holdings Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2080, is governed by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors. The company operates under Hong Kong listing rules and maintains standard board committees, including a nomination committee and a remuneration committee.
